summary: Code refactoring verification - ALL TESTS PASSED. Extracted TipStaffTab, DMModal, SendDrinkModal from LocationDetailPage.jsx and HookahSection from MenuPage.jsx into separate component files. Both pages render correctly with no import errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Good refactoring - extracted monolithic components into reusable modules
Index.js files export components and constants properly
TipStaffTab, DMModal, SendDrinkModal are correctly imported in LocationDetailPage.jsx
HookahSection is correctly imported in MenuPage.jsx
Constants (AVATAR_EMOJIS, MOODS, TIP_AMOUNTS, DRINK_OPTIONS) are exported from index.js for reuse
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring complete. Extracted components are in /app/frontend/src/components/location-page/ and /app/frontend/src/components/menu-page/ directories with proper index.js exports.

LocationDetailPage loads correctly at /l.details: Page loads without errors, all elements render properly

LocationDetailPage shows DJ LIVE NOW ban.details: DJ MIKE banner with LIVE NOW indicator and TIP DJ button visible

LocationDetailPage shows CHECK IN button.details: CHECK IN TO JOIN THE VIBE button visible and clickable

LocationDetailPage shows WALL/DMs/INFO t.details: All three tabs present and clickable, navigation works

MenuPage loads correctly at /menu.details: Page loads without errors, shows OUR MENU header and category filters

MenuPage Hookah section displays correct.details: Clicking Hookah category shows full HookahSection with all elements

MenuPage shows Safety & Policies section.details: Safety & Policies section visible with Refills, Handling, Liability, Health Warning

MenuPage shows Premium Flavors section i.details: 7 premium hookah flavor cards displayed ($35 each)

MenuPage shows Classic Flavors section i.details: 5 classic hookah flavor cards displayed ($30 each)

extracted_components_verified.location-page/TipStaffTab.jsx: Component for tipping staff with token balance display
extracted_components_verified.location-page/DMModal.jsx: Direct message modal with chat interface
